overview: Demon Dog is a Normal-class Demon/Beast monster found in Inferno. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 60 HP, 16 physical damage, 350 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 2 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Dash Attack at 220% ratio (352 base damage). Sight range 1000, combat radius 180. Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Return Damage Nightmare.

phases.name: Rush / Charge
phases.description: 1 rush/charge attacks for gap-closing. Dash Attack (220%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Ice, Light, Divine
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Ice (-3000), Light (-3000), Divine (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Very Fast — 350 Move Speed
strategies.description: Base move speed of 350 makes this one of the fastest monsters. Outrunning it is difficult.

strategies.title: Highest Damage: Dash Attack (220% ratio)
strategies.description: Dash Attack deals 352 damage at base (220% ratio). This is the most dangerous attack to avoid.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Return Damage Nightmare
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Return Damage Nightmare. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1000 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1000 units, loses target at 2100 units, 80° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 180, ability check distance 220
strategies.description: Combat area radius 180. Ability check distance 220.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Return Damage Nightmare

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1000 units. Loses target at 2100 units.
